holdings.infoBox: MSLC is an equity ETF with a total of 1010 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.53%, Apple at 4.71%, Microsoft at 4.18%, Amazon.com at 4.04%, and Alphabet at 3.47%.

overview.description: The Morgan Stanley Pathway Large Cap Equity ETF (MSLC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of US large-cap equity securities. The fund utilizes a multi-manager strategy in constructing the portfolio. MSLC was launched on Nov 18, 1991 and is issued by Morgan Stanley.
